note: Cross-language determinism fixture: seed + initial layout + a recorded two-critter action script + the full per-step trace (state, obs incl. opponent channels, forager reward, gem positions) from the Python reference env. apps/course2 replays `actions` through env.ts from the same seed (A then B each step) and asserts every traced value matches within 1e-6. Regenerate with `camp-precompute rl-export` whenever env dynamics change.
